talk_metadata.talk_title: Neural integration of glioblastoma and therapeutic disconnect
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: perampanel is a drug that needs very careful titration because obviously you suffer from neuropsychiatric side effects.
Speaker said: we also need to develop bespoke translation readouts for neuronal connectivity in glioblastoma patients.

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Off‑target CNS neuropsychiatric effects not mitigated by tumor‑specific delivery
vulnerability_identified.hidden_tox_signal: perampanel is a drug that needs very careful titration because obviously you suffer from neuropsychiatric side effects

trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Enrolling all glioblastoma patients without molecular stratification for neuronal connectivity
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: Baseline tumor‑neuron connectivity score to enrich for patients likely to benefit
trial_dilution_risk.static_vs_dynamic_failure: No on‑treatment ctDNA or serial imaging to track emergence of resistance
trial_dilution_risk.statistical_concern: Primary endpoints are surrogate RNA‑seq connectivity score and AI‑MRI dynamics, not overall survival

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker disclosed that perampanel is already approved for epilepsy, suggesting limited novel IP for the oncology indication
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Broad label trial without biomarker‑selected population may dilute signal

cognitive_dissonance: Speaker showed electron‑microscopy evidence of bona‑fide synapses between neurons and tumor cells, then concluded that perampanel can be used broadly despite acknowledging neuropsychiatric toxicity that may limit dosing

key_data_gaps: No safety summary beyond anecdotal neuropsychiatric side‑effects

crispro_opportunity.description: Develop a computational connectivity biomarker to select patients with high tumor‑neuron synaptic activity for perampanel therapy
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Primary endpoints in this trial are basically based on an RNA Seq connectivity score, as well as AI‑based MRI growth dynamics.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate multi‑omics connectivity signatures to predict which tumors rely on AMPA‑mediated synapses

crispro_opportunity.description: Target downstream calcium signaling pathways that sustain proliferation after AMPA blockade
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Synaptic inputs lead to measurable electrophysiological currents that get translated into calcium events in tumor cells.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model calcium‑dependent transcriptional programs to identify combinatorial targets

crispro_opportunity.description: Incorporate serial ctDNA and functional imaging to monitor emergence of resistance during perampanel treatment
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: We need to understand on a really ultra structural basis what really happens when we give patients this perampanel.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can generate adaptive trial simulations that include dynamic biomarker updates

unresolved_questions: What is the contribution of innate and adaptive immune cells to neuron‑tumor synapses?
Can immunocompetent mouse models fully recapitulate the human neuron‑tumor network?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Screening platform for disconnecting tumor‑tumor microtubule networks
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: I didn't want to focus on a target that actually kills the cells, but rather, a drug that actually disconnect the cells.
Speaker said: I don't see this drug as a really translational drug for now, but I wanted to really focus on the methods and designing a platform.

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: Broad PKC activation affects multiple pathways beyond tumor microtubule disconnection
vulnerability_identified.hidden_tox_signal: PKC activators are controversial and may have off‑target effects; speaker noted they are not currently translational

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Platform relies on phenotypic readouts without a defined molecular target, making IP protection limited
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Focus on disconnecting agents without concurrent efficacy data may dilute translational relevance

cognitive_dissonance: Speaker emphasized that disconnecting tumor microtubules halts growth, yet admitted the PKC activator used is not clinically translatable and may have broad off‑target effects

key_data_gaps: No in vivo efficacy beyond mouse models
No pharmacokinetic or safety data for TPBB

crispro_opportunity.description: Leverage CrisPRO's computational spine to predict selective PKC downstream effectors that disconnect microtubules without global PKC activation
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: I didn't want to focus on a target that actually kills the cells, but rather, a drug that actually disconnect the cells.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can simulate pathway‑specific PKC modulation to identify narrow‑spectrum compounds

crispro_opportunity.description: Combine microtubule‑disconnecting agents with standard radiotherapy or temozolomide to exploit radiosensitization
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: We designed a platform to find drugs that actually disconnect those networks. Then once they are sensitive we target them with standard of care treatments.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model synergistic effects of disconnectors with DNA‑damage agents

unresolved_questions: What downstream phosphorylation events mediate microtubule disconnection?
Does PKC activation affect neuron‑tumor synaptic connections as well?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Myeloid monocyte and neutrophil dynamics in glioblastoma
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: We got a cellular resistant mechanism to ablating monocytes infiltration in the form of accelerated neutrophil infiltration.
Speaker said: Dexamethasone inhibits IL‑1, which is a major pro‑inflammatory cytokine, and changes completely myeloid and lymphoid profile in this tumor.

vulnerability_identified.mechanistic_blindspot: MPO‑mediated netosis creates immunosuppressive macrophages; inhibition leads to increased neutrophil numbers but altered phenotype
vulnerability_identified.unexplained_resistance_quote: Neutrophils in MPO‑deficient tumors increase in number and become APC‑like, but survival benefit is only modest
vulnerability_identified.ghost_responder_admission: MPO knockout mice showed significant survival shift compared to proficient mice

trial_dilution_risk.target_biology: Targeting inflammatory monocyte infiltration (CCR2‑high) in GBM
trial_dilution_risk.flawed_enrollment_criteria: Preclinical models used only human xenografts in immunodeficient mice, missing neutrophil‑macrophage crosstalk
trial_dilution_risk.missing_biomarker: Baseline neutrophil/MPO activity in patient tumors
trial_dilution_risk.static_vs_dynamic_failure: No longitudinal monitoring of neutrophil netosis or macrophage phenotype

competitive_moat_weakness.ip_vulnerability_note: Speaker showed that blocking monocyte entry leads to compensatory neutrophil infiltration, indicating a biological redundancy
competitive_moat_weakness.clinical_strategy_weakness: Focusing on a single myeloid subset ignores adaptive neutrophil compensation

cognitive_dissonance: Speaker demonstrated that neutrophil netosis drives immunosuppression, yet earlier emphasis on monocyte targeting suggests a contradictory focus on a single myeloid arm

key_data_gaps: Lack of clinical trial data testing MPO inhibition in patients
No assessment of steroid impact on neutrophil dynamics in vivo

crispro_opportunity.description: Re‑engineer CCR2 inhibitors with concurrent neutrophil/MPO modulation to prevent compensatory infiltration
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Ablating monocytes infiltration led to accelerated neutrophil infiltration.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model dual‑target networks to predict synergistic blockade of CCR2 and MPO pathways

crispro_opportunity.description: Develop a spatial MPO‑netosis signature to select patients who may benefit from MPO inhibition
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: MPO‑deficient tumors showed altered neutrophil phenotype and improved survival.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can integrate spatial proteomics and RNA‑seq to generate a predictive MPO activity score

cited_competitors.name: MPO inhibitors
cited_competitors.context: Discussed as a potential way to alter neutrophil‑macrophage immunosuppression

unresolved_questions: How does dexamethasone specifically affect neutrophil netosis and MPO activity in GBM?
What are the long‑term resistance mechanisms after MPO inhibition?
